description_long: This kiosk is a modern, rectangular structure with a flat roof and open sides, designed for promotional or informational use in urban environments. The exterior is adorned with vibrant, travel-themed graphics, including large photographic collages, passport stamp motifs, and a prominent 'travelart' logo. One side features a full-length image of a woman in blue attire, while another side displays a collage of travel photos, suggesting a focus on tourism or art. The kiosk has a partially enclosed central section, with open walkways on either side, allowing easy access and visibility from multiple directions. The construction appears to use lightweight metal framing with printed panels, and the interior is open, providing space for displays or interaction. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on visual impact and accessibility.
description: A modern, open-sided kiosk with travel-themed graphics, flat roof, and prominent 'travelart' branding. Features vibrant printed panels, open walkways, and a partially enclosed central section.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main 'travelart' logo, a large image of a woman, and passport stamp graphics on a tall central panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the open structure, with the 'travelart' logo on a smaller panel and visible interior space.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a collage of travel photos and additional branding, with open walkways on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features a full-length image of a woman and yellow passport stamp graphics on the side panel.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo, integrated into front and side panels, with 'travelart' text and travel-themed graphics.
attribute_door_configuration: Open archway, one main entry at the front and open sides.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof, black surface, extends over central section with no visible overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, minimalist with graphic branding elements.
